tweets.title:
Ministery of Defence issue RPF for India's indigenous 5th Gen fight jet programme.

BREAKING: The Ministry of Defence has formally issued the Request for Proposal (RFP) for the indigenous 5th-generation Advanced Medium Combat Aircraft (AMCA) project, shortlisting three private sector-led consortia to build five initial prototypes.

To fast-track the testing timeline, a new dedicated Flight Testing Centre is being established at Puttaparthi, Andhra Pradesh. The AMCA will integrate stealth technology, sensor fusion, and advanced AI features for the Indian Air Force.

Through sustained diplomatic engagement and coordinated efforts between the Directorate General of Shipping, Ministry of Ports, Shipping and Waterways, Ministry of External Affairs, Embassy of India in Tehran, RPSL company, vessel managers, and other stakeholders, the seafarers have now been released and reunited safely. Necessary arrangements are being coordinated for the earliest return of the crew members to India.

26th May 2026:

- We will be posting daily war updates on the ongoing war in Middle East
- ⁠Follow us for daily Brief

● Iranian negotiators signaled openness to transferring the country’s highly enriched uranium stockpile to China, seeking Beijing’s security guarantees as part of a potential nuclear agreement with the US.

● Partial restoration of internet connectivity began in Iran on day 88 of near-total blackout — the longest nationwide internet shutdown in the country’s history.

● UKMTO reported an incident 60 nautical miles east of Muscat, Oman. A vessel suffered an external explosion on the port side near the waterline, with some bunker fuel discharged into the sea. The crew is safe.

● The IDF dismantled ~11km of underground tunnel routes east of the Yellow Line in the Beit Hanoun area in northern Gaza, a former Hamas terrorist stronghold.

● The US Navy resumed escorting commercial vessels through the Strait of Hormuz under the revived “Project Freedom.” A Greek supertanker carrying 2 million barrels of crude was the first vessel escorted.

● Trump urged Saudi Arabia, Qatar, Pakistan, Turkey, Egypt, and Jordan to join the Abraham Accords and normalize ties with Israel. Pakistan rejected the invitation.

END OF THE BRIEF

tweets.title:
BREAKING: Home Minister Announces High-Level Panel on Demographic Change

Union Home Minister Amit Shah has announced the formation of a high-level committee to examine “unnatural demographic changes” in India, citing concerns linked to national security, sovereignty, and social stability. 

According to Shah, the panel will study demographic shifts allegedly caused by illegal infiltration and other factors, following a broader “Demography Mission” announced by PM Narendra Modi in 2025. 

The committee is expected to:

- Examine patterns of demographic change
- Assess security implications, especially in border regions
- Recommend measures to address illegal infiltration and related challenges 

The announcement comes amid the government’s push for a “smart border” project along the Pakistan and Bangladesh frontiers to strengthen surveillance and prevent illegal crossings.

tweets.title:
Russia’s upgraded Ka-226T helicopter has successfully completed its maiden flight with the new indigenous VK-650V engine.

Key highlights:

1. Earlier powered by French Safran Arrius 2G1 engines
2. Now equipped with Russia’s domestically developed VK-650V turboshaft engine
3. Flight tests included taxiing, stable hovering, and aerial maneuvering
3. Major step towards reducing dependence on Western aerospace components amid sanctions
4. The Ka-226T is also linked to the India-Russia joint helicopter production program (Was pushed on Back burner earlier).
